mainEntity.name: Fixing a Drop in Organic Leads from AI Search Tools
mainEntity.text: Fixing a Drop in Organic Leads from AI Search Tools

acceptedAnswer.text: If your organic leads are dropping, AI search tools might be intercepting your traffic. You can fight back by optimizing for "cited sources." This means creating high-value content that AI can't help but reference. It’s a specialized game, but the reward is a steady stream of high-intent clients. Need a hand getting your firm into those citations? Let’s chat at aiovisibility.com.
